calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-15-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brent Kato for Emily Chin.

Mr. Kato addressed the issue regarding the courtesy copies stating that they meant to submit them to the Court. The Court stated that it had reviewed the documents and then granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.
